data.title: Why Pixie Dust Technologies (PXDT) Stock Is Down 30%
data.description: Pixie Dust Technologies shares are trading lower by 32% during Thursday's session. The company's board has decided to voluntarily delist its ADRs from NASDAQ and apply for SEC deregistration.

data.title: Garrett Motion Q3: Sales Plummet 14% Amid Weak Vehicle Demand, Cuts FY24 Topline Forecast
data.description: GTX stock down after weak Q3 sales and lowered FY24 guidance due to industry softness and competitive pressures. Gross profit margin increased, but EPS missed estimates.

data.title: PayPal's Stablecoin Receives $1M Grant Program, Senior VP Sees Stablecoins As 'Killer App' For Crypto Payments
data.description: Fireblocks on Thursday announced a $1 million grant program aimed at accelerating the adoption of PayPal USD (CRYPTO: PYUSD), a stablecoin issued by Paxos.

data.title: Intel Triumphs In 15-Year Legal Battle, EU Court Rejects Record Antitrust Penalty
data.description: Intel wins EU court ruling against $1.14 billion fine in antitrust case. Stock up 0.32% at $22.07. Facing smaller fine for alleged behavior.

data.title: Kraken To Launch DeFi-Focused 'Ink' Blockchain In Early 2025
data.description: Kraken, one of the leading centralized cryptocurrency exchanges, is set to launch its own blockchain, “Ink,” in early 2025.
